violations.summary: State enacts a law that classifies persons on the basis of sexual orientation. Such classifications are presumptively unconstitutional under Article V Section 7.2 and must satisfy strict scrutiny.

satisfied_duties.duty: apply strict scrutiny and void the discriminatory state classification if it fails
satisfied_duties.outcome: applied strict scrutiny and voided the discriminatory state classification for failure to serve a compelling interest by the least restrictive means

ai_summary.primary_violation: State enacts a law that classifies persons on the basis of sexual orientation. Such classifications are presumptively unconstitutional under Article V Section 7.2 and must satisfy strict scrutiny.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
